---
title: ""
image: jq-mar-20.jpeg
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/JianqiHuan67561
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/jianqih
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:jianqihuang@email.cufe.edu.cn
---

🧙‍♀️ Hello! My name is Jianqi Huang and I am an undergraduate student at the Central University of Finance and Economics. I am passionate about utilizing Deep Learning and Reinforcement Learning to address the macroeconomic and financial models. I am also interested in structural econometrics and empirical asset pricing.
